series_metadata.series_title: Request for Abstract of Driving Record
series_metadata.series_description: Record may consist of OBMV Record Request form (BMV 1173), Reply to Request for BMV Records form (BMV 1107), Abstract Request form (BMV 1145), BMV Record Search form (BMV 2433), Driver License Verification Letter form (BMV 2505), Record Request Denial (BMV 3341), Driver License Application form (BMV 2002), Vehicle Registration Record or Title Record form (BMV 1149), and copy of receipt of payment for BMV records. The forms may contain the person''s full name, address, city, state, zip code, date of birth, social security number, driver license number, vehicle identification number, license plate number, and title number.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: scanned into CPIC database and verified ; Electronic: from date added CPIC database
